constitutional_claims: QuarantineManager implements mechanical quarantine: every fail-closed and quarantine-behavior violation auto-quarantines without human action
Every violation (including advisory) emits an immutable AuditEvent — no exceptions
Escalation routed mechanically to the registry escalation_target for all quarantined violations
No constructor options exist that can suppress quarantine — adversarial invariant proven
QuarantineResult and AuditEvent.payload are Object.freeze()'d — immutable after creation
Unblocks UTV2-1094 (INIT-1.3.4 — Production and Replay Integration)
Runtime Certification dependency satisfied for Stage 2
